name: Susie Essman
bio: Susie Essman is an American stand-up comedian, actress and writer who began performing in New York comedy clubs in the 1980s. She is best known for playing the profane, sharp-tongued Susie Greene on HBOs Curb Your Enthusiasm across its full run. She has also worked as a voice actor and author.

timeline.ev: Appeared in and advised on the film Punchline
Began playing Susie Greene on Curb Your Enthusiasm
Published the book What Would Susie Say

accolades: Long-running role as Susie Greene on Curb Your Enthusiasm

bits.yt_title: Susie Essman from 'Curb Your Enthusiasm' Performs Stand-Up | Gotham Comedy Live
